It's, it's a shame that people can, like, super wide format.

I think it looks stunning.
No, they do.
I'm just, I was just comparing desktop versus mobile.

But of course, the experience on, on desktop is so much better.
If you say so.

Okay, I don't have a lot.
I was publishing some articles for you now, but just to share the numbers.

The clicks, like, gain a little bit back of what we missed.

Like, it's still performing really well, but there was this search.
Vallarta, improving a lot.
We were like...

And that's it, that's all I had, was like, do we have any, I sent you the new version of the copy with the considerations for SEO, I added some more stuff, it's, it's, I started adding there, but, like, with the spacing issue, it would be really great if we could solve that before, or else we're going to have to manually add, and then go back again, and, uh, take out the spaces when we have that fixed.
Yeah, yeah, I, I understand, however, now, you didn't give any,
Back about the copy.
Did you like it?
Do you think that's...
I haven't seen it.
I can share more.
I can open here.
Okay.
can do this.
So all those terms that were in the list of the research, that we did, I added.
Okay.
I added the FAQs as well.
Mm-hmm.
Okay.
Four.
Four FAQs.
And I also like made sure we are communicating, we're talking to people that are staying in the hotel zone.
Mm-hmm.
Okay.
Like it was a day trip.
Mm-hmm.
And...
And...
What else?
Also, we changed the angle here for the best time to visit.
Mariana, I think we have agreed that those titles of where to eat or where to stay, we were not going to include them.
Let me see the original.
Where to eat?
Uh-huh, for instance, in my email, I said that we should keep on where it's located, how long does it take, what is to see there.
But do you think it's a problem if we keep it for the search volume sake?
Let's take a look at the, let's see if it has.
I don't want to post content that doesn't make sense.
Okay.
I don't want to insist, of course, but like the way it is here, it's, or is it, I don't know, this, where to eat.

There are no restaurants or food vendors as they are part, and then we recommend like full day eco-discovery tours include barbecue lunches and open bars, so we leverage this search to talk about, to mention the fact that the, in this case, you wouldn't need to go to any restaurants because the tours already include food.
Okay, but we can take it out, I'm just thinking out loud, not necessarily thinking about Maria.

But the rest of the destinations, like, for example, if we're talking about Chichen Itza, I'm pretty sure there are vendors outside, but it's not a recommendation we are going to give, as in our tour, people will have, you know, the option to, and people won't go there to eat, you know what I'm saying?
And there are other destinations.
Sayulita, for example, is a super cool destination for dining.
However, I'm not sure.
Again, I'm not sure.
And I'm also not sure, since we're going to, to need to manually add each one of these pages, it's not a problem if we add this section to some of the pages and, and don't Not necessarily to all.
It wouldn't be like a huge problem since it's kind of like a.

Manual, the process of putting, but I totally get your point of the where to, like there's no search volume for that keyword where to eat in Marietta's Island, but the fact that I've seen too many times, sometimes you add an article, for example, things to do in November in Puerto Vallarta, you think there's, because it shows zero and sometimes you end up getting a lot of traction from that.
article that was showing, for that keyword that was showing zero, but I think it's not like, it wouldn't, it's not a make or break the success of the pages issue, okay?
And it's going to be the same thing with where to stay.
First, well, in Marietas in particular, there's no place to stay, but in other destinations where there is, the problem we are going to encounter is that there's, that's,

a subject in itself, know, let's say Sayulita or Todos Santos, there is a huge variety of places, huge variety of restaurants, and people that we want to attract is not people who's looking for staying there, you know.
Yeah, we will be missing the target in the sense of we will be talking to people that want to stay in Sayulita when, in fact, we want to talk to people that are staying the main destination.
Yeah, I get it.
Do you think we should replace for other types?

I think you already covered the ones we recommended, it's a shorter list, but we, at the same time, we are trying to avoid cannibalization, so we don't need to, know, like, cover every single topic regarding that destination.
Because some of those topics are already in the tour pages, right?
The ones I recommended based on Carlos's recommends were...
A ver, donde lo puse.
Ay, ya lo perdi.
Sorry, look at other, like, different sections to add more, like, cultural...
Maybe the name of the species, can be...
have two words to add.

Yeah, so I was saying, where is located, that I think you already got it, how far it is from Puerto Vallarta, or the main destination, how to get there, that's important, especially for people who think they can get there by themselves, and in some cases they would be able to.
So, for example, to go to Sayulita, you can take a public transportation bus, it will cost...
Nothing like $2, but it will take you two hours to get there, so maybe, and there's no AC, so there's a pros and cons, you know.
It would be the best experience.
Exactly.
So we can talk about those, like, less ideal ways to go there, and then we will highlight the benefits of going with us in a tour in general.
What is there to see in that place?
Where is the best moment to visit, or you already put, like, places to see, and travel tips to visit.
And we can travel tips, maybe the packing list can be part of the travel tips.
Yeah, when I redid this, I have this part where I have the information for all the tours, and I pasted the information of the tours we're recommending.
So, let me just a second.
So, I have this, like, cards with all the tours, with the information that's in the page, what to bring, inclusions, duration, so I copy and pasted it, and so that is reflected, for example, here.
For example, how long is the boat ride to Marietta's Island?
It added some information from the tours, so more connected to the tours.
Yep.
Okay.

And I think, like, since we're launching different pages, different angles, it's not just the main destinations, I think we can, and this is a block of text, I think it's not, we don't need to have the same structure here, okay?

Yeah, that's good.
That's a good idea.
And let's say another alternative, again, I'm not insisting, just bringing in the alternatives, is to bring this to the FAQs.
Not this, but the...
The word to say and what to eat.
Yeah, these two.
Just quick FAQs at the end.
Yeah.

No, you can't.

Congratulations.

Uh-huh.

Hi, guys.
I'll have to escape for a second, but please continue.
Okay.
I don't have any topics.
don't know if you have anything else you want to add.
Not really.

that's good, though.
Okay.
Okay.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss landing page progress, SEO performance, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New landing page videos in progress; vertical versions pending for mobile optimization](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Record-breaking SEO performance: 400k impressions, improvements in Vallarta, Cancun, and Cabo](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Content strategy refinement: focusing on destination-specific info, tour details, and FAQs while avoiding cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

## Topics

### Landing Page Video Progress

  - [Videographer working on new header videos for Yelapa, Caletas, and Mahahuitas](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Vertical versions for mobile pending; Isabel awaiting these to start landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [70-75% of traffic is mobile, but desktop experience is notably superior](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Mobile landing page design praised for its stunning appearance](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)

### SEO Performance Update

  - [New record: 400,000 impressions achieved](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Clicks recovering from previous dip](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Specific article success: "drinking age in Mexico" (Cancun) performing well](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Vallarta showing significant improvement after targeted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Cabo also hitting record clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

### Content Strategy and Copywriting

  - [New version of copy with SEO considerations sent for review](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Added terms from previous research and four FAQs](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Content tailored for hotel zone visitors and day-trip perspective](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Debate on including "where to eat" and "where to stay" sections:](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
      - [Concern about relevance and potential to mislead target audience](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Suggestion to move these topics to FAQs if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

### Destination Page Structure

  - [Agreed sections: location, distance from main destination, how to get there, what to see, best time to visit, travel tips](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Emphasis on highlighting tour benefits vs. independent travel](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Inclusion of tour-specific information (e.g., what to bring, inclusions, duration)](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Suggestion to add photos within text blocks for visual appeal](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

### SEO Tactics and Considerations

  - [Discussion on including low-volume keywords for potential future traction](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Focus on avoiding cannibalization with existing tour pages](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Flexibility in page structure based on destination and angle](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Await vertical versions of videos for mobile landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Revise copy to remove "where to eat" and "where to stay" sections from main content](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Consider adding relevant questions to FAQ section (e.g., "Can I stay at Marietas Island?")](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Incorporate photos into text blocks for improved visual appeal](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy to balance SEO potential with relevance and user intent](https://fathom.video/share/9zpx8JddcSyjnVqZ7BzsB54ocPBGcPxW?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

action_items.description: Review new version of copy with SEO considerations shared by Mariana
Add photos to break up text blocks in landing page content
